name: pokemon-team-viewer
description: MCP App that renders a Pokemon team from Showdown format

scripts.build: cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=dist/main.js
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "tsx --watch src/main.ts"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
